zh.lifeSummary: 當Placentia De Montoire於大約0967年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特蒙圖爾時，她的父親Nidhard De Montoire I26歲，母親Nihard de Montoire27歲。她和Odo de Montdoubleau至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1062年在法國洛易-吉黑蒙圖-素勒-洛易享年97歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Placentia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jesus, Antonio, Pedro, Salvador, Eduardo, Juan, Marina, Miguel, Emilio, Felipe, Francisco.

Spanish and Basque: habitational name from Placencia (in Basque: Plaentzia), a town in Gipuzkoa province, Basque Country (Spain), in Basque also known as Soraluze and hence officially named bilingually as Soraluze-Placencia de las Armas.

variants.name: Placencio
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish and Basque Placencia , with the male suffix -o for matching with the sex of the bearer of the surname.

variants.name: Plasencia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Juan, Jorge, Roberto, Carlos, Javier, Luis, Manuel, Miguel, Ana, Eusebio.

Spanish: habitational name from Plasencia in Cáceres province, and possibly also a Castilianized form of a habitational name from Plasenzia, the name of towns in Zaragoza and Huesca (Aragon). Compare   Placencia  .

variants.name: Plascencia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Manuel, Miguel, Roberto, Arturo, Francisco, Carlos, Javier, Luis, Pablo.
Hispanic (mainly Mexico) altered form of Spanish   Placencia   or   Plasencia  .

en.lifeSummary: When Placentia De Montoire was born about 0967, in Montoire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Nidhard De Montoire I, was 26 and her mother, Nihard de Montoire, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Odo de Montdoubleau. She died about 1062, in Montoire-sur-le-Loir, Loir-et-Cher, France, at the age of 97.

Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Odo de Montdoubleau. Elle est décédée environ 1062, à Montoire-sur-le-Loir, Loir-et-Cher, France, à l’âge de 97 ans.

Sie hatte mit Odo de Montdoubleau mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1062 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Montoire-sur-le-Loir, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich.

ko.lifeSummary: Placentia De Montoire(이)가 대략 0967년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 몽이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nidhard De Montoire I(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nihard de Montoire(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Odo de Montdoubleau(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1062년 프랑스 로이-트-처 몽이레-수-레-로이르에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.
